text: 魔神城戦：不断の闘志

異世界オメガ、ヴェルン皇国近辺の荒野に
魔神城の召喚を確認。また、魔神城のほか
正体不明の強力な熱源も感知されています。
乱戦が予想されますが「破界鎚」を召喚し
これらの撃破をお願いします。
――――――――――――――――――――
クエストプレイ可能回数/$(0)回
制限時間の経過でクエスト終了
敵の戦力ゲージを０にするか
制限時間経過時に残量が上回っていれば勝利
Castrum Demonica: Hostility

We've confirmed that Castrum Demonica has been
summoned in Alternate Dimension: Omega. We've
also detected a strong source of unknown origin in
the Castrum Demonica. The battle will be hectic,
but it should be possible to dispatch the enemy by
summoning the Buster Ram.
-------------------------------------------
This quest can only be played $(0) time(s).
Achieve victory by depleting enemy's force or
ensuring your power is higher when time expires.
魔神城を撃破せよ！
Destroy the Castrum Demonica!

敵軍、攻撃準備に入った模様！
今のうちに兵器セットの選択と
マナの回収を進めましょう！

マナを溜めるとアークス兵器が
強化され、召喚する破界鎚の数が
増えるなどの恩恵がありますよ！

敵軍の侵攻を確認！
破界塔を守りつつ、可能な限り
マナを回収して下さい！

敵軍、再度侵攻開始！
マナを一定量回収するごとに
破界塔が自動で回復しますよ！

敵軍、再侵攻開始！
破界塔を壊されないよう殲滅しつつ
マナの回収をお願いします！

大変です！　破界塔に向けて
敵軍が侵攻を開始しました！
一旦後退し、防衛に専念して下さい！

再度敵軍が侵攻を開始！　結界は
突破しましたが、破界塔を壊されたら
勝機はありません！注意して下さい！

魔神城から強力な反応を確認！
破界塔を狙った攻撃のようです！
確実に阻止して下さい！

再び魔神城から強力な反応……！
魔神城の攻撃を阻止し
破界塔を防衛して下さい！

破界鎚、召喚完了！
敵軍から破界鎚を護衛し
障壁を壊しましょう！

破界鎚、召喚完了！
敵軍の攻撃から破界鎚を守り
残った障壁を壊しましょう！

破界鎚を召喚しました！
今度こそ敵の障壁を突破しましょう！

全障壁の破壊に成功！
あとは魔神城を倒すだけです！
まずは腹部のコアを攻撃しましょう！

魔神城は、一定時間ごとに
破界塔に向けてレーザーを放ちます！
早急にコアを破壊してください！

魔神城を攻撃するために
左右の階段から中央の橋上に
移動して下さい！

今度も魔神城は、一定時間ごとに
強力なレーザーを放ってきます！
急ぎ撃破を！

再び防衛機構に登り
魔神城の弱点部へ向かってください！

敵軍の制圧を確認！
破界鎚を召喚中です。今のうちに
進軍の準備をお願いします！

再度破界鎚を召喚し障壁を攻撃します！
マナを回収して、召喚する
破界鎚の数を増やしましょう！

破界鎚召喚中！
攻め込む準備をして下さい！

破界鎚の消滅、及び敵増援を確認！
再侵攻が予測されるため
破界塔の守りを固めて下さい！

破界鎚の消滅、及び
再度敵増援を確認！
破界塔の守りを固めて下さい！

破界鎚の全破壊、及び
再度敵増援を確認しました！
破界塔の守りを固めて下さい！

敵軍の動きに変化を確認しました！
一部エネミーは自爆してきますよ！
注意して下さい！

敵軍、数が減ってきています！
このまま押し切りましょう！

敵軍、残りあとわずかです！
あと少しですよ！

魔神城に不穏な動き有り！
妨害を仕掛けてきそうです！
各員は状況に応じ行動して下さい！

一定量のマナを回収しました！
より多くの破界鎚が召喚できます！
引き続きマナを回収しましょう！

$(0)破界塔の損傷拡大！
至急救援に向かって下さい！

$(0)破界塔、もう持ちません！
大至急救援をお願いします！

破界塔の機能停止を確認！
残るは３つです！　まだ余裕は
あります！　焦らずに行きましょう！

２つ目の破界塔も機能停止しました！
予断を許さない状態です！
注意して下さい！

３つ目の破界塔、機能停止！
残る１つは必ず死守して下さい！

全ての破界塔の停止を確認。
残念ですが、これ以上の
戦闘継続は不可能です。

魔神城から超巨大エネルギー反応！
このままだと拠点が危ないです！
全力で凌いで下さい！

自軍の損傷拡大中！
これ以上被害が大きくなれば
撤退することになります！

自軍の損傷甚大！　これ以上は
耐えられません！　破界塔を守り
被害を最小限に抑えて下さい！

戦闘可能時間、残り半分です！
戦局がこちらに傾いていれば勝利ですが
可能であれば魔神城を撃破して下さい！

戦闘可能時間、残りわずかです！
あと少し、最後まで諦めずに
頑張って下さい！

敵軍の撤退を確認しました！
損傷もさほど大きくなく
我々の勝利ですよ！

魔神城の消滅を確認！
我々の完全勝利です！

それでは帰還して下さい。
お疲れ様でした！

破界塔の損傷を確認。
これ以上の戦闘は難しいです。
一度退却しましょう。

全破界塔の機能停止を確認……
これ以上の戦闘継続は難しいので
一度退却しましょう。

残念ですが……仕方がないです。
帰還して下さい。

It appears the enemy is preparing to attack!
Now is the time to select your Weapons
Set and collect mana!

By accumulating mana, your ARKS Weapons
will become stronger and the number of
Buster Rams summoned will increase,
among other benefits.

Enemy advance confirmed!
Collect as much mana as you can while protecting
the Buster Towers!

The enemy has restarted their advance!
The Buster Tower will heal itself every time you
collect a certain amount of mana!

Enemy advance resuming!
Collect mana while eliminating hostiles so that the
Buster Towers are not damaged!

This is bad! The enemy host has started its
assault on the Buster Towers! Back off a bit
and focus on defense!

The enemy has resumed its attack! We have
broken through the barrier but we won't win this
battle if the Buster Towers are destroyed! Be careful!

We're picking up strong readings from the Castrum
Demonica! It appears to be aiming for the Buster
Towers! Make sure you don't let it through!

We're picking up more strong readings from the
Castrum Demonica...! Prevent the attack from the
Castrum Demonica and protect the Buster Towers!

The Buster Ram has been summoned!
Guard the Buster Ram from the enemy
and destroy the barrier!

The Buster Ram has been summoned!
Guard the Buster Ram from the enemy's
attacks and destroy the remaining barrier!

We've summoned the Buster Ram! Now is our
chance to break through the enemy barrier!

We've succeeded in destroying the entire barrier!
All that's left is to destroy the Castrum Demonica!
First, attack the abdominal core!

The Castrum Demonica will fire a laser
periodically at the Buster Towers!
Destroy the core as quickly as you can!

Move to the central bridge via
the left or right stairs to attack
the Castrum Demonica!

The Castrum Demonica is once again firing
a powerful laser at fixed intervals!
Destroy it quickly!

Climb the defense structure again and head
for the weak points of the Castrum Demonica!

The enemy is bearing down on us!
Currently summoning the Buster Ram.
Get ready to advance while you still can!

Summon the Buster Ram and attack the barrier
again! Collect mana to increase the number of
Buster Rams summoned!

Summoning the Buster Ram!
Get ready to attack!

The Buster Ram has been destroyed and enemy
reinforcements have arrived! Shore up the
Buster Tower's defenses to prepare for another
attack wave!

The Buster Ram has been destroyed and more
enemy reinforcements have arrived!
Shore up the Buster Towers' defenses!

The Buster Ram has been completely destroyed
and more enemy reinforcements have arrived!
Shore up the Buster Towers' defenses!

The enemy host appears to be altering its strategy!
Some enemies are self-destructing!
Exercise caution!

The enemy's numbers are dwindling!
Now's our chance to steamroll them!

Only a few enemies remain!
Shouldn't be long now!

Something disturbing is happening to the
Castrum Demonica! It looks like it's trying
to put countermeasures in place!
Adapt your strategy as needed!

You have recovered enough mana to increase
the number of Buster Rams summoned!
Keep collecting mana!

$(0)The Buster Tower has sustained extensive damage!
You must move quickly to intervene!

$(0)The Buster Tower isn't going
to hold out much longer! Your
intervention is urgently required!

The Buster Tower has stopped functioning!
There are three left! We aren't in dire straits
yet so keep it together!

The second Buster Tower has stopped functioning!
We can't sustain many more losses!
Be careful!

The third Buster Tower has stopped functioning!
You must protect the sole remaining tower at
all costs!

All Buster Towers have been neutralized.
Unfortunately, we will not be able to
continue the battle further.

We're picking up a supermassive reading from
the Castrum Demonica! The base is in
grave danger if something isn't done.
Do the utmost that you can!

Damage is spreading through our forces!
If we sustain much more damage there will
be no option but to retreat!

Our forces have sustained massive damage!
We can't take much more! Protect the
Buster Tower and minimize your damage exposure!

Only half the allotted battle time remaining!
We can win this if we keep up the momentum!
Destroy the Castrum Demonica where possible!

Not much of the allotted battle time remains!
We just need to push on for a little longer,
so don't give up!

Enemy forces are falling back!
We managed to secure victory with only
minimal losses!

Castrum Demonica is annihilated!
Victory for us!

It is time for you to return home.
Thank you for your brave service!

The Buster Tower has taken damage.
Continuing the battle further will be difficult.
Temporary retreat is advised.

All Buster Towers have been disabled...
Continuing the battle further will be difficult,
so a temporary retreat is advised.

Unfortunately... we have run out of options.
Please return.

まもなく転送です。
今回の目的はヴェルンの魔神城撃破です！

魔神城だけでなく、巨大な力も感知……
おそらく、ファルス・ヒューナルです！
くれぐれも注意してください！

Teleporting shortly.
Your objective is to destroy the
Weyland Castrum Demonicas!

We've detected a massive power source in
addition to the Castrum Demonica... It's likely
to be Falz Hyunal! Don't let your guard down!
